name: Detail Header
description: Page header for detail views with title, metadata, status, and action buttons

standard.description: Title, subtitle/description, status badge, breadcrumb, and action buttons. Horizontal layout with bottom border.

slots.breadcrumb: Navigation breadcrumb trail with BreadcrumbItem links
slots.title-row: Horizontal row with title on left and action buttons on right: _flex _row _jcsb _aic
slots.title: Page heading with _heading2
slots.subtitle: Description text with _bodysm _fgmuted
slots.status: Badge showing current status (active, draft, archived)
slots.actions: Action buttons group: edit, delete, share with _flex _gap2

profile.description: Large avatar on the left, name/title/bio on the right, stats row, and action buttons (follow, message).

slots.avatar: Large Avatar (96px) with image and fallback initials
slots.info: Vertical column with name, title, bio: _flex _col _gap2 _flex1
slots.name: Display name with _heading2
slots.title: Role or title with _bodysm _fgmuted
